title: More Leaf Particles
description: Mod changing the default leaf particle's texture based on the leaves that it originates from.
body: ### GENERAL This mod changes the look of the particles occasionally falling from leaves, depending on the type of leaves they originate from. This includes: - **Spruce** - now drop spruce needles - **Birch** - now drop birch-looking-like leaves - **Mangrove** - now drop mangrove-looking-like leaves - **Azalea** - now drop azalea-looking-like leaves - **Flowering Azalea** - now drop azalea-looking-like leaves and petals - **Jungle** - now drop slightly bigger leaves - **Acacia** - now drop acacia-looking-like leaves - **Dark Oak** - now drop oak-looking-like leaves ![overview of the particle changes and additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HwWDzPBa/images/30b864b2688cdadc718772932d6cb77ed4b2d8c5.png) ### CONFIG This mod is configurable, if [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) and [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) are installed. Here's a list of all configurable options: - Color _(Only for tinted particles)_ - Disabled by default, defaults to `#000000` (pure black) - Use Tint - Disabled by default - When the Color option is enabled, calculates the final color as an average of the Color option value and biome tint of the leaves block, from which the particle originate. - Size - Defaults to `2.0` - Gravity Strength - Defaults to `0.07` - Initial Y velocity - Determines how fast is the particle falling upon spawning - Defaults to `0.021` - Wind Factor - Determines how much "wind" affects the particle. When increased, particles will descend in bigger circles - Defaults to `10.0` - Flow Away - Disabled by default - When true, the particles gradually drifts from its origin point ### ISSUES If you encounter any issues regarding this mod, please visit the issue tracker on this mod's GitHub repo. ### USAGE IN MODPACKS, ... You are free to use this mod in modpacks or include it in other mods, as long you give credit. #### LICENSE More Leaf Particles © 2025 by Fellter_CZ is licensed under CC BY 4.0
